title: Database Maintenance
subtitle: Perform database maintenance operations and manage data integrity
warning_body: This operation will permanently delete ALL data in the database including:
warning_item_interactions: All tags, likes, and interaction data
warning_final: This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have a backup if needed.
dialog_confirm_body: You are about to permanently delete all data in the database...
dialog_item_all_data: All data rows in every table will be permanently deleted
dialog_checkbox_understand: I understand that all data will be permanently deleted
error_message: Database reset failed. Please try again.
